title: Propose a change to a rule that binds you
summary: Plugin authors, self-hosters and hub operators can now file a Rule Change Proposal against an enumerated operational rule — the humane-patterns gate, allowed plugin licences, marketplace terms, the Charter's refused rents, the Moat Register, or plan quotas — and get a public written answer with reasoning within 30 days. Decisions, including refusals, are recorded in a public append-only log.
